series_metadata.series_title: Unassociated Photograph, Negatives Files, and evidentiary records –All Investigations
series_metadata.series_description: Legacy Investigatory photograph negatives, photos, and other legacy evidentiary records unassociated with investigation files or otherwise unidentifiable, up to year 2019.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Shred original paper photo, negative or record as they are obsolete or of no evidentiary value. ; Electronic: Delete electronic paper photo, negative or record as they are obsolete or of no evidentiary value. ; Microform: Shred microfilm as records contained therein are obsolete or of no evidentiary value
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
